label: Break into the Roadside Barrow
note: Dragon's Lair entrance (docs/RAIL-COMMAND.md §Each map's FOUR sub-tracks): the first lair on the spine — the dragon's brother dug a nest beneath the rescue road, the brood's first warren. Breaking into the barrow mouth relocates the princess into its first room. The cheapest lair (roses logarithmic shortcut, gems exponential fallback).
